case_number: criminal revision application is dismissed as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Rev. App. No. S – 99 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 29.04.2024 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Panhwar, Advocate for applicants. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for applicants submits that he would not press this application, if directions are issued to the trial court to expedite the trial and conclude the same within a reasonable time as parties have compromised and such applications have been filed before the trial Court, but on account of absence of complainant, the same are pending. Learned Deputy Prosecutor General has no objection. Accordingly, this criminal revision application is dismissed as not pressed. However, trial court is directed to proceed with the matter expeditiously and decide it within a period of two months under intimation to this Court. J U D G E Abdul Basit
